title: Add real food images for Nellore Chepala Pulusu, Prawns Biriyani, and Natu Kodi Kura

requirements.text: Update `frontend/src/components/CuisineSection.tsx` to render the newly generated images for Chepala Pulusu, Prawns Biriyani, and Natu Kodi Kura. Map each dish name to its corresponding image filename in `/assets/generated/` and display it as the card banner image. Maintain the existing South Indian theme styling (terracotta, gold, teal palette, Playfair Display / Lato fonts) and keep the emoji fallback for any dish without a generated image.

quotes: Add real images for Nellore chepala pulusu and prawns biriyani, natu kodi kura

acceptanceCriteria: The Chepala Pulusu cuisine card displays the generated chepala-pulusu image as its banner.
The Prawns Biriyani cuisine card displays the generated prawns-biriyani image as its banner.
The Natu Kodi Kura cuisine card displays the generated natu-kodi-kura image as its banner.
Cards for dishes without a generated image still fall back to the emoji icon display.
All cuisine cards retain the existing South Indian terracotta/gold/teal theme and card layout.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
Images must be served as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated/ — do not route them through the backend.
nonGoals: Adding or modifying backend cuisine data.
Adding images for any cuisine items not mentioned (other than the three specified dishes).
Changing the overall layout or theme of the Cuisine section.

required: Nellore-style Chepala Pulusu — a rich, tangy South Indian fish curry in a clay pot with tamarind-based red gravy, garnished with curry leaves and green chilies, served on a banana leaf (chepala-pulusu.dim_800x500.png)

Prawns Biriyani — a fragrant layered prawn biryani with saffron-colored basmati rice, whole spices, caramelized onions, and juicy prawns, garnished with fresh coriander and mint (prawns-biriyani.dim_800x500.png)
Natu Kodi Kura — a rustic Andhra-style country chicken curry with a dark, spicy masala gravy, curry leaves, and red chilies in a traditional clay cooking vessel (natu-kodi-kura.dim_800x500.png)
